twitter_thread: Earned $1,200 last month from a single AI-powered affiliate marketing campaign with a 12% conversion rate.
Promoted AI tools like DeepL and WordLift, earning $40 per sale on average.
Spent $300 on Facebook ads, reaching 10,000 targeted users with a 2% click-through rate.
Used AI-driven content creation tools like Content Blossom to produce 20 high-converting ad copies.
Monitored ad performance with Google Analytics, adjusting bids to maximize ROI.
Avoided sending traffic to a single landing page, instead using 5 variants to optimize conversions.
What's your highest-earning AI-powered affiliate marketing campaign? #aipowered #passiveincome
